title: Towny Cobblemon
description: Welcome to Cobblemon Towns, a modded multiplayer experience where the world feels alive, every city tells a story. Build your dream town, train your team, and shape a thriving, player-driven world full of adventure and community.
body:
Welcome to Cobblemon Towns, a modded multiplayer experience where the world feels alive, every city tells a story.
Build your dream town, train your team, and shape a thriving, player-driven world full of adventure and community.

🐾 Features
✨ Cobblemon Adventure Experience
Catch, train, battle, and explore handcrafted world full of secrets and biomes.

🏙️ Town-Building & Player Economy
Form your own town, become a mayor, or join a rising community.
Earn currency, trade with NPCs & players, and grow your settlement into a bustling hub.

👥 NPC Interaction & World Immersion
Custom citizens, quests, vendors, trainers, and jobs make the world feel alive.
Visit town shops, unlock new features, and expand your influence.

💰 Custom Currency & Shops
Collect coins from battles, trades, events & exploration.
Upgrade your team, gear, housing, and town infrastructure in a deep progression system.

🏞️ Exploration & Lore
Rare loot, custom structures, and themed regions await brave explorers.
Every biome tells a story, every journey shapes your legacy.

🎮 Balanced RPG Progression
No pay-to-win — just strategy, teamwork, and adventure.
Whether you focus on building, battling, collecting, or roleplay, there’s a path for you.
